component.name: VTracer GTK
component.summary: Convert raster images to vector SVG graphics

description.p: A modern GTK4/libadwaita GUI wrapper for VTracer, the high-performance raster-to-vector converter. VTracer can convert photographs, scans, and pixel art into compact SVG vector files using an O(n) algorithm that handles colored images (unlike Potrace which requires binarized input).

ul.li: Single image and batch folder conversion
Full control over VTracer parameters: color mode, corner threshold, filtering, spline fitting, and more
Built-in presets for black & white, poster, and photo modes

description.p: Initial release — single image conversion, batch mode, all VTracer parameters, before/after preview.

screenshot.caption: Main window with image preview and settings panel
